component.name: CategoryItem
component.script:
sub init() print "CategoryItem.brs - [init] CategoryItem initialized" m.background = m.top.findNode("background") m.categoryLabel = m.top.findNode("categoryLabel")
if m.background = invalid then print "CategoryItem.brs - [init] ERROR: background is invalid" if m.categoryLabel = invalid then print "CategoryItem.brs - [init] ERROR: categoryLabel is invalid" end sub
sub onContentChanged() content = m.top.itemContent print "CategoryItem.brs - [onContentChanged] Content changed, content type: " + Type(content)
if content <> invalid if content.title <> invalid m.categoryLabel.text = content.title print "CategoryItem.brs - [onContentChanged] Set label text to: " + content.title else print "CategoryItem.brs - [onContentChanged] ERROR: content.title is invalid" end if else print "CategoryItem.brs - [onContentChanged] ERROR: content is invalid" end if end sub
sub onFocusPercentChanged() focusPercent = m.top.focusPercent
if focusPercent >= 1.0 ' Fully focused m.background.color = "#6366f1" m.background.opacity = 1.0 m.categoryLabel.color = "#ffffff" else ' Not focused m.background.color = "#1e293b" m.background.opacity = 0.8 m.categoryLabel.color = "#ffffff" end if end sub
